response.step_by_step_log: 1. Audited audio: The video contains a single repeating instrumental background track throughout. No vocal music is present. 2. Visual segmentation: Segments were identified based on the transitions between the scrolling fan messages, the 'starting soon' graphic, the 'Attention' visitor information, and the 'Merch' sales screens. 3. Final verification: Confirmed that all scenes contain instrumental audio only; set contains_vocal_music to false for all scenes and null for all lyric-related fields.
response.global_summary: The video is a repeating presentation featuring fan support messages for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, along with informational screens regarding concert merchandise and visitor guidelines. The video is accompanied throughout by instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Fan support messages scrolling on screen for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert.
Screen displaying 'The concert will be starting soon' with character artwork.
'Attention for Visitors' screen with flashing light and cheering guidelines.
'2nd Round of Concert Merch Sales' information screen.
Resumption of scrolling fan support messages.
Screen displaying 'The concert will be starting soon' with character artwork.
'Attention for Visitors' screen with flashing light and cheering guidelines.
'2nd Round of Concert Merch Sales' information screen.
